description: Compound request: classify an independent scheduled notification and a chat-based support assistant separately.

conversation.text: 1) Every weekday at 9am, Slack me the Berlin weather. 2) Create a support assistant that chats with customers and decides when to escalate.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the weather notification is a scheduled trigger with a fixed action, while the support assistant's chat-based escalation decisions require agent-anchored reasoning.
The agent treats the two parts as independent automations with separate lifecycles rather than merging them into a single classification.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
